items.change_action: may be accepted if verifiable with both secrets
items.change_condition: During a limited transition window after server secret rotation.
items.new_value: accepted under either of two secrets
items.related_state_or_step: server cookie verification after secret change
items.extracted_evidence: If the server wishes to allow legitimate clients to handshake through the transition (e.g., a client received a cookie with Secret 1 and then sent the second ClientHello after the server has changed to Secret 2), the server can have a limited window during which it accepts both secrets. ... An alternative approach is simply to try verifying with both secrets.
